sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 5.22 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.5)

statement.latex: Does there exist a version of the Higman embedding theorem in which the degree of unsolvability of the conjugacy problem is preserved? %The versions known at present do not preserve this degree. { D.\,J.\,Collins} Yes, there does (A.\,Yu.\,Olshanskii, M.\,V.\,Sapir, The conjugacy problem and Higman embeddings\/ (Memoirs AMS, { 804}), 2004, 133\,p.).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
